Real-world work

Case Studies

Documented engagements showing the breadth and depth of what we build. Enterprise identity automation, finance workflows, and multi-cloud cost governance at scale.

Case Study · Enterprise / Retail (multi-brand)

Microsoft 365 Identity & Access Automation

Problem

Manual daily IT management of Microsoft 365 access for approximately 2,100 employees across multiple retail brands in Australia and New Zealand. Distribution lists, shared mailbox access, licence assignments, and group memberships all required daily manual intervention by IT staff.

Solution

Fully automated, rule-driven scheduling system with time-aware access control, ownership-based approvals, and full audit logging. Eliminated all manual IT intervention for day-to-day identity and access operations.

Outcome
Zero daily manual IT intervention for access management
Microsoft 365 Identity Automation PowerShell Entra ID
Case Study · Multi-brand Retail / Franchise

Finance Workflow Automation — Petty Cash

Problem

4 FTE accounts payable staff manually processing petty cash daily across 200+ brands and 2,000+ locations across Australia, New Zealand, and Singapore. Manual reconciliation, access provisioning, and approval routing consumed significant operational capacity.

Solution

End-to-end finance workflow automation integrated with Active Directory, Entra ID, and Oracle HCM. Automated access provisioning, approval routing, reconciliation, and reporting across all brands and regions.

Outcome
Eliminated manual petty cash processing for 4 FTE accounts payable staff
Business Process Automation Entra ID Active Directory Oracle HCM
Case Study · Enterprise Technology (~5,000 employees, global)

Multi-Cloud FinOps Tooling

Problem

Approximately $7M USD per year in cloud spend across AWS, Azure, and GCP with no unified spend visibility. Cloud costs could not be classified by workload, team, or initiative. No mechanism to track savings decisions from identification through to realisation.

Solution

Multi-cloud cost analysis and governance platform: classifies spend, produces evidence-backed findings, manages decision lifecycle, and tracks realised savings across all three cloud providers from a single interface.

Outcome
Unified cost visibility and savings realisation tracking across $7M USD/year cloud estate
FinOps Multi-Cloud Governance AWS Azure GCP
